response.justification: Maria Rodriguez brings 17+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience and has worked at meaningful scale (millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby), but critically lacks the experimentation platform expertise that is the core competency of this role. There is no evidence of A/B testing systems, feature flagging infrastructure, telemetry pipelines, rollout-risk management, or statistical analysis work anywhere in the resume. The current Staff/Senior title is below the Principal/IC6 seniority bar expected, and while technical breadth is present, the deep specialization in growth measurement and experimentation frameworks required for this position is entirely absent.
strengths: 17+ years of diverse technical experience across C++, Java, TypeScript, and DLang with production deployments across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Proven high-scale distributed systems work at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency async I/O microservices
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling work at re:cinq (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows) demonstrates adaptability to emerging paradigms relevant to the employer's domain
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management — the primary technical focus of this role
No evidence of telemetry infrastructure, metrics systems, or experimental statistical analysis; the role demands deep data aptitude as a core requirement

Current seniority (Staff/Senior) and scope of impact fall below the Principal/IC6 bar, which requires demonstrable cross-team architectural ownership and multi-workstream technical leadership at scale
